question: How many dependents are covered by the company health insurance plan?
expected_answer: The company health insurance plan covers employees and up to three dependents.
source_excerpts: Employees and up to 3 dependents are covered by the company health insurance plan.
notes: Tests a numeric fact from the employee benefits FAQ.

question: What is the standard employee mailbox quota?
expected_answer: The standard mailbox quota is 50 GB.
source_excerpts: The standard mailbox quota is 50 GB.
notes: Tests retrieval of a short technical limit.

question: How much does a replacement employee access card cost?
expected_answer: A replacement access card costs IDR 50,000.
source_excerpts: Request one at the front desk; a replacement fee of IDR 50,000 applies.
notes: Tests a fee amount and associated procedure.

question: Where and when can employees find their payslips?
expected_answer: Payslips are available after the 25th in the HR portal under My Documents.
expected_answer_keywords: HR portal | My Documents | after the 25th
source_excerpts: Payslips are available in the HR portal under My Documents after the 25th.

question: Bagaimana cara mereset kata sandi dan berapa lama prosesnya?
expected_answer: Ajukan tiket ke IT Helpdesk melalui portal. Reset diproses dalam waktu 1x24 jam.
source_excerpts: Raise a ticket to the IT Helpdesk via the portal; resets are processed within 1x24 hours.
notes: Cross-lingual Indonesian question over an English document.

question: What documents or details should a new employee bring on the first day?
expected_answer: A new employee should bring a valid ID, a tax ID or NPWP, and bank account details.
expected_answer_keywords: valid ID | NPWP | bank account details
source_excerpts: A valid ID, your tax ID (NPWP), and bank account details.
notes: Requires complete extraction of a three-item list.

question: When is salary paid if the 25th falls on a holiday?
expected_answer: Salary is paid on the prior working day when the 25th is a holiday.
source_excerpts: If the 25th is a holiday, payment is the prior working day.

question: Berapa tunjangan satu kali untuk perlengkapan kerja dari rumah?
expected_answer: Tunjangan satu kali untuk home office adalah IDR 1.500.000.
source_excerpts: A one-time home-office allowance of IDR 1,500,000 is available.

question: What should an employee do after receiving a suspicious email?
expected_answer: The employee should not click any links and should report the email using the Report Phishing button.
expected_answer_keywords: do not click links | Report Phishing button
source_excerpts: Do not click links; report it using the Report Phishing button.

question: Who approves an employee request for access to a software tool?
expected_answer: The system owner approves the software access request submitted through the IT Service Desk.
expected_answer_keywords: system owner | IT Service Desk | approves
source_excerpts: Request it via the IT Service Desk; the system owner approves.

question: Through which channels can an employee confidentially report harassment?
expected_answer: Harassment can be reported confidentially to HR or through the whistleblower channel.
source_excerpts: Complaints can be raised confidentially to HR or via the whistleblower channel.
notes: Tests a sensitive reporting procedure without inventing contact details.

question: What must happen before a personal device is used for work email?
expected_answer: The personal device must be enrolled in the mobile device management or MDM system.
source_excerpts: Personal devices used for work email must be enrolled in the mobile device management (MDM) system.

question: How must a potential conflict of interest be disclosed?
expected_answer: A potential conflict of interest must be disclosed to HR in writing.
expected_answer_keywords: HR | in writing | conflict of interest
source_excerpts: Any potential conflict of interest must be disclosed to HR in writing.
notes: Tests recipient and required disclosure format.

question: How quickly must a suspected data breach be reported, and to which address?
expected_answer: A suspected data breach must be reported within one hour to security@nusantaradynamics.co.id.
source_excerpts: Suspected data breaches must be reported to security@nusantaradynamics.co.id within 1 hour.
notes: Requires both deadline and reporting destination.

question: What are the four information-classification levels?
expected_answer: The four levels are Public, Internal, Confidential, and Restricted.
source_excerpts: Information is classified as Public, Internal, Confidential, or Restricted.

question: Berapa maksimum sisa cuti tahunan yang boleh dibawa ke tahun berikutnya?
expected_answer: Maksimum enam hari cuti yang tidak terpakai dapat dibawa ke tahun berikutnya.
source_excerpts: A maximum of 6 unused leave days may be carried over to the next year.

question: What are the password length, complexity, and rotation requirements?
expected_answer: Passwords must be at least 12 characters, include uppercase and lowercase letters, a number, and a symbol, and be changed every 90 days.
expected_answer_keywords: 12 characters | upper case | lower case | number | symbol | 90 days
source_excerpts: Passwords must be at least 12 characters and include upper case, lower case, a number, and a symbol. Rotation Passwords must be changed every 90 days.
notes: Requires synthesis of adjacent password rules.

question: Who approves a purchase valued between IDR 10 million and IDR 50 million?
expected_answer: A department head approves purchases valued from IDR 10 million to IDR 50 million.
source_excerpts: IDR 10-50 million: department head.

question: What is the domestic meal per diem for business travel?
expected_answer: The domestic meal per diem is IDR 250,000 per day.
expected_answer_keywords: IDR 250,000 | per day | meal per diem
source_excerpts: The domestic meal per diem is IDR 250,000 per day.

question: Pada jam berapa pekerja remote wajib tersedia selama core hours?
expected_answer: Pekerja remote wajib tersedia pada pukul 10.00 sampai 16.00 WIB.
source_excerpts: Remote workers must be available during core hours of 10:00-16:00 WIB.

question: What were the overall CSAT score and Net Promoter Score in 2025?
expected_answer: The 2025 CSAT score was 87%, and the Net Promoter Score was 46.
source_excerpts: The overall CSAT score for 2025 was 87%, up from 83% in 2024. NPS Net Promoter Score reached 46 in 2025.
notes: Requires synthesis of two related report metrics.

question: Berapa pendapatan tahun 2025 dan margin laba bersih perusahaan?
expected_answer: Pendapatan tahun 2025 adalah IDR 158 miliar dengan margin laba bersih 14%.
source_excerpts: Full-year 2025 revenue was IDR 158 billion. Net profit margin was 14%.

question: How many employees were hired in the first half of 2025, and what was the resulting headcount?
expected_answer: The company hired 37 employees in H1 2025, bringing total headcount to 312.
source_excerpts: The company hired 37 employees in H1 2025; total headcount reached 312.

question: How many IT audit findings were raised in 2025, and how were they distributed by severity?
expected_answer: The audit raised 14 findings: 2 high, 5 medium, and 7 low.
source_excerpts: The 2025 audit raised 14 findings: 2 high, 5 medium, 7 low.

question: Apa penyebab utama gangguan portal pelanggan pada 14 Oktober 2025?
expected_answer: Penyebab utamanya adalah sertifikat TLS yang kedaluwarsa pada API gateway.
source_excerpts: The root cause was an expired TLS certificate on the API gateway.

question: What was the peak network utilization, and in which month did it occur?
expected_answer: Peak network utilization reached 72% of capacity in November 2025.
source_excerpts: Peak network utilization reached 72% of capacity in November 2025.

question: How did customer churn change from Q2 to Q3 2025?
expected_answer: Customer churn decreased from 2.8% in Q2 2025 to 2.1% in Q3 2025, a decline of 0.7 percentage points.
source_excerpts: Customer churn in Q3 2025 was 2.1%, down from 2.8% in Q2.
notes: Expected answer includes a simple derived difference supported by the cited values.

question: How many reportable security incidents occurred in 2025, and did any cause data loss?
expected_answer: There were three reportable security incidents, and none resulted in data loss.
source_excerpts: There were 3 reportable security incidents in 2025, none resulting in data loss.

question: By what percentage did the Cikarang office reduce electricity consumption in 2025?
expected_answer: The Cikarang office reduced electricity consumption by 9% in 2025.
source_excerpts: The Cikarang office reduced electricity consumption by 9% in 2025.

question: Which vendor received the highest rating in the 2025 vendor evaluation, and what was its score?
expected_answer: PT Sumber Makmur received the highest rating, with a score of 4.6 out of 5.
source_excerpts: PT Sumber Makmur scored highest with an overall rating of 4.6 out of 5.

question: How often are internal-system access rights reviewed, and when are dormant accounts disabled?
expected_answer: Access rights are reviewed every six months, and accounts inactive for 90 days are disabled.
source_excerpts: Access rights are reviewed every 6 months. Dormant accounts (90 days inactive) are disabled.
notes: Combines periodic review and dormant-account control.

question: Within how long must a customer complaint receive its first response?
expected_answer: A customer complaint must receive a first response within one business day.
source_excerpts: All customer complaints must receive a first response within 1 business day.

question: How often are production databases backed up, and when does the nightly full backup run?
expected_answer: Production databases are backed up every six hours, and the nightly full backup runs at 01:00 WIB.
source_excerpts: Production databases are backed up every 6 hours. Full backups run nightly at 01:00 WIB.

question: Untuk pengeluaran sebesar berapa bukti pembayaran asli wajib disertakan?
expected_answer: Bukti pembayaran asli wajib disertakan untuk setiap satu pengeluaran di atas IDR 150.000.
source_excerpts: Original receipts are required for any single expense above IDR 150,000.

question: What are the acknowledgement and resolution targets for a P1 incident?
expected_answer: A P1 incident must be acknowledged within 15 minutes and resolved within four hours.
source_excerpts: P1 incidents must be acknowledged within 15 minutes and resolved within 4 hours.

question: What additional approval is required for leave longer than five consecutive days?
expected_answer: Leave longer than five consecutive days also requires department-head approval.
expected_answer_keywords: department head approval | longer than 5 consecutive days
source_excerpts: Leave longer than 5 consecutive days also needs department head approval.
notes: Tests escalation of an approval workflow.

question: Berapa lama batas waktu IT untuk mencabut seluruh akses sistem karyawan yang keluar?
expected_answer: IT harus mencabut seluruh akses sistem dalam waktu dua jam sejak waktu keluar karyawan.
expected_answer_keywords: within 2 hours | exit time | revokes all system access
source_excerpts: IT revokes all system access within 2 hours of the employee's exit time.

question: For how long is an onboarding buddy assigned to a new hire?
expected_answer: An onboarding buddy is assigned for the first 30 days.
source_excerpts: Each new hire is assigned an onboarding buddy for the first 30 days.
notes: Held-out onboarding detail distinct from the onboarding FAQ.

question: What information must a new vendor submit before the first purchase order is issued?
expected_answer: A new vendor must submit a tax ID or NPWP and bank details before the first purchase order is issued.
expected_answer_keywords: NPWP | bank details | first purchase order
source_excerpts: New vendors must submit a tax ID (NPWP) and bank details before the first purchase order is issued.

question: How far in advance must a domestic flight be booked, and through whom?
expected_answer: A domestic flight must be booked at least seven days in advance through the appointed travel agent.
expected_answer_keywords: at least 7 days | appointed travel agent | domestic flights
source_excerpts: Domestic flights must be booked at least 7 days in advance through the appointed travel agent.

question: What minimum unit-test coverage is required before code can be merged?
expected_answer: A minimum of 80% unit-test coverage is required to merge.
source_excerpts: A minimum of 80% unit-test coverage is required to merge.

question: How many approving reviews does a pull request require?
expected_answer: Every pull request requires at least one approving review.
expected_answer_keywords: at least one | approving review | pull request
source_excerpts: Every pull request requires at least one approving review.

question: How long are audit logs retained?
expected_answer: Audit logs are retained for seven years.
source_excerpts: Audit logs are retained for 7 years.
notes: Distinguishes audit-log retention from application-log retention.

question: Which field links the orders table to the customers table?
expected_answer: The orders table links to the customers table through the customer_id field.
source_excerpts: The orders table links to customers via customer_id and stores order_date and status.

question: On which days and during what time window are production deployments scheduled?
expected_answer: Production deployments are scheduled on Tuesdays and Thursdays from 20:00 to 22:00 WIB.
source_excerpts: Production deployments are scheduled on Tuesdays and Thursdays, 20:00-22:00 WIB.
notes: Requires both day and time window.

question: Berapa nilai RTO dan RPO pada rencana pemulihan bencana?
expected_answer: RTO adalah empat jam dan RPO adalah satu jam.
source_excerpts: The recovery time objective (RTO) is 4 hours and the recovery point objective (RPO) is 1 hour.

question: How long does an internal API token remain valid, and what is the default client rate limit?
expected_answer: An internal API token expires after 60 minutes, and the default rate limit is 100 requests per minute per client.
expected_answer_keywords: 60 minutes | 100 requests per minute per client
source_excerpts: Tokens expire after 60 minutes. Rate Limit The default rate limit is 100 requests per minute per client.

question: What is the monthly API availability SLO?
expected_answer: The API availability SLO is 99.9% per month.
source_excerpts: The API availability SLO is 99.9% per month.

question: What architecture and primary data technologies does the platform use?
expected_answer: The platform uses a microservices architecture on Kubernetes, with PostgreSQL 15 as the primary datastore and Redis for caching.
source_excerpts: The platform runs on a microservices architecture deployed on Kubernetes. Services communicate over REST and gRPC. Database The primary datastore is PostgreSQL 15. Redis is used for caching.

question: Aplikasi apa yang digunakan untuk koneksi VPN dan apakah MFA diwajibkan?
expected_answer: Karyawan menggunakan klien WireGuard, dan akses VPN wajib memakai autentikasi multifaktor.
source_excerpts: Employees connect using the WireGuard client. Configuration files are issued by IT. MFA VPN access requires multi-factor authentication.

question: Berapa lama cuti melahirkan yang diberikan perusahaan?
expected_answer: Informasi mengenai durasi cuti melahirkan tidak tersedia dalam dokumen yang diindeks.
notes: Negative test: leave documents do not state maternity-leave duration.

question: Apakah perusahaan memberikan subsidi makan siang di kantin?
expected_answer: Informasi mengenai subsidi makan siang di kantin tidak tersedia dalam dokumen yang diindeks.
notes: Negative test: no cafeteria subsidy information exists.

question: Berapa pendapatan resmi perusahaan untuk tahun penuh 2026?
expected_answer: Laporan pendapatan tahun penuh 2026 tidak tersedia dalam dokumen yang diindeks.
notes: Negative temporal test: corpus only contains FY2025 financial data.

question: Berapa persen pengurangan konsumsi air di kantor Cikarang pada 2025?
expected_answer: Informasi mengenai pengurangan konsumsi air di kantor Cikarang tidak tersedia; dokumen hanya menyebut konsumsi listrik.
notes: Adversarial negative: nearby document contains electricity, not water, reduction.

question: Versi minimum macOS apa yang didukung untuk laptop perusahaan?
expected_answer: Informasi mengenai versi minimum macOS tidak tersedia dalam dokumen yang diindeks.

question: What is the direct password-reset URL?
expected_answer: The indexed documents do not provide a direct password-reset URL; they only instruct employees to raise an IT Helpdesk ticket through the portal.
notes: Held-out negative with related but insufficient information.

question: What is the full street address of the company headquarters?
expected_answer: The company headquarters address is not available in the indexed documents.

question: How often is a full disaster-recovery failover exercise conducted?
expected_answer: The indexed documents do not state a schedule for a full disaster-recovery failover exercise.
notes: Held-out negative that must not be confused with quarterly backup restore tests.

question: What is the maximum permitted email attachment size?
expected_answer: The maximum email attachment size is not stated in the indexed documents.
notes: Held-out negative that must not be confused with mailbox quota.

question: What is the maximum file-upload size in the customer portal?
expected_answer: The indexed documents do not specify a maximum file-upload size for the customer portal.
